_comment: Live data override — May 20, 2026. Keys: 'MACRO:<id>' or '<SYM>:<signalId>'. Only included fields override the seed.

MACRO:dram_contract.reading: +58–63% Q2 (decel from +90–95% Q1); PC DRAM slowed Apr — deceleration is the tell

MACRO:cap_react.reading: Meta −9% on raised guide; regime shifting — market no longer uniformly rewarding capex

MACRO:cap_sales.reading: ORCL ~86%, META ~54%, MSFT ~47% capex/sales — FCF reckoning approaching

NVDA:data-center-seq-growth.reading: Q1 FY27 REPORTS TOMORROW (May 21 AH) — prior qtr +20% QoQ; consensus ~$43B DC rev; high bar

NVDA:gross-margin-trend.reading: ~74.9% prior qtr; Q1 FY27 print TOMORROW — any guide compression off 74–75% is the Tier-1 trigger

NVDA:expectations-vs-guide.reading: Street above mgmt guide; Q1 FY27 prints TOMORROW May 21 AH — unmeetable bar = fade-risk setup

NVDA:ma200.reading: Est. ~30–35% above 200-day avg at $1,138 — extended heading into earnings

NVDA:react.reading: Beat-and-fade 4 of last 5 prints; EARNINGS TOMORROW May 21 AH — this is the key catalyst print

MU:cycle-pricing-roll-see-m.reading: Contract +58–63% Q2 (decel from +90–95% Q1); PC DRAM slowed Apr; HBM still firm — spot is the leading indicator to watch

MU:gross-margin-direction.reading: ~81% guided (Q2 FY26) — near all-time peak; Q3 FY26 print ~late June is next check; first seq. dip = trigger

AMD:mi-series-share-wins.reading: MI300X/325X winning MSFT, Meta, GOOG sockets; AMD DC rev ~$3.7B Q1 FY26 (+57% YoY) — growing fast but NVDA still ~5–6x AMD AI rev

AMD:gross-margin.reading: ~53% Q1 FY26; flat QoQ — healthy but 20+ pts below NVDA; MI-series mix-shift is the gross margin lever
